case_title: RICHARDSON FRED VS GUTIERREZ FEDERICO DBA GUTIERREZ BROS BODY AND PT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $560.00 FILED BY RICHARDSON FRED AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ FEDERICO DBA GUTIERREZ BROS BODY AND PT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARDSON FRED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ FEDERICO DBA GUTIERREZ BROS BODY AND PT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
